node.text:
Comment “Agent” and I’ll send you the full course to build AI agents from scratch. 👇
Nobody built this course before.
One guy pulled resources from Anthropic, OpenAI, and top experts — and made the definitive guide anyone can follow.
2.3 million people saw this on X. Now you know why.
Save this post. Share it with someone learning AI.
